title: Best SaaS Affiliate Programs With Recurring Commissions in 2026
excerpt: Earn every month from a single referral. These SaaS programs pay 30–60% recurring — some for the lifetime of the customer.
imageAlt: SaaS software subscriptions and recurring revenue dashboard
seoTitle: Best SaaS Affiliate Programs 2026: Recurring Commissions
seoDescription: Top SaaS affiliate programs paying 30–60% recurring commissions in 2026. GetResponse, Systeme.io, HubSpot, Notion, and more.
body:
One referred customer can pay you every single month for years. That's the core logic behind SaaS affiliate programs — and why the best ones pay anywhere from 30% to 60% recurring, sometimes for the lifetime of the subscription. Here are the programs worth your time in 2026, ranked by what they actually pay.

## Systeme.io — 60% Lifetime Recurring

Systeme.io is an all-in-one marketing platform (funnels, email, courses, memberships) that pays 60% recurring commission on every paying customer you refer, for the lifetime of their subscription. The cookie window is 180 days. That's the most generous structure on this list by a meaningful margin.

The catch: Systeme.io competes with ClickFunnels, Kajabi, and Teachable — it's not a household name. You'll need to create genuinely useful comparison content to drive conversions. But if you can, a customer paying $97/month nets you $58.20 every month indefinitely.

## GetResponse — 40–60% Recurring

GetResponse is an email marketing platform with tiers: 40% recurring as a standard affiliate, rising to 50% after 50 active referrals and 60% after 100. The 12-month recurring window is generous, and GetResponse's $15–$99/month price range means real commissions even at the entry tier.

GetResponse converts well in content targeting small business owners and online course creators. Their affiliate dashboard is clean, payouts are monthly, and the brand has enough recognition that cold audiences don't need heavy convincing.

## HubSpot — 30% for 12 Months

HubSpot's affiliate program pays 30% recurring for the first 12 months per referred customer, with a 90-day cookie — one of the longest standard cookies in B2B SaaS. HubSpot's plans run from $50 to $3,600/month, so that 30% on a mid-tier deal is genuinely substantial.

The program is best for content creators with a B2B or marketing audience. Landing page comparison content and CRM review articles consistently drive HubSpot conversions.

## Notion — 50% for First 12 Months

Notion now pays affiliates 50% of all payments for the first 12 months on net-new signups that upgrade to a paid Plus, Business, or AI plan. Given Notion's explosive growth in team adoption, this is one of the newer entrants worth adding to your stack.

Notion converts extremely well in productivity and remote work content. A single "best note-taking apps" or "Notion vs. Obsidian" article can drive consistent monthly signups.

## ManyChat — 50%, 120-Day Cookie

ManyChat is the dominant platform for Instagram DM automation, Facebook Messenger marketing, and WhatsApp business flows. Their affiliate program pays 50% recurring with a 120-day cookie — one of the most generous tracking windows available.

> A customer paying $15/month on ManyChat earns you $7.50 every month for as long as they stay subscribed.

The best ManyChat affiliate content targets e-commerce store owners and social media marketers who are already spending on Instagram and Facebook ads.

## Moosend — 40% Recurring

Moosend is a budget-friendly email marketing platform that pays up to 40% recurring for every paying customer referred. Their pricing starts at $9/month, making it accessible content for bootstrapped founders and early-stage businesses — a large and underserved audience segment.

## Building a Recurring Revenue Stack

The real strategy is to promote three to five complementary SaaS tools rather than a dozen competing ones. A business owner who uses GetResponse for email, Notion for project management, and HubSpot for their CRM isn't choosing between your recommendations — they're adopting all of them. Stack your affiliate content accordingly.
